name: Document Grid Tag Editor — Save Tags
notes: The Save button (lines 852-858) is part of an inline modal rendered by renderTagEditor() (line 812) inside the god-component DocumentGrid; the modal is triggered by the 🏷️ button on each document card or list row.
handleSaveTags optimistically patches local documents[] state in-place on success — no full reload is performed; the modal closes and the card immediately reflects the new tags.

Tags are written directly to documents_v2.tags (a PostgreSQL TEXT[] column); the upload-time sync trigger deliberately omits the tags column, so tag saves are isolated to documents_v2 and do not propagate back to documents.
On API failure handleSaveTags logs to console.error and clears tagSaving, but shows no error message to the user; the modal stays open so the user can retry.
